"use strict"; Object.defineProperty(exports, "__esModule", { value: true }); Object.defineProperty(exports, "default", { enumerable: true, get: function() { return _default; } }); const flattenColorPalette = (colors)=>Object.assign({}, ...Object.entries(colors !== null && colors !== void 0 ? colors : {}).flatMap(([color, values])=>typeof values == "object" ? "" : `-${number}`)]: hex })) : [ { [`${color}`]: values } ])); const _default = flattenColorPalette;
